title: [codereview-pass1] coap_status.c: map_count now overcounts without capacity encoding
description: After updating map_count to 9 base keys, the encode still only emits ~7 keys. This will produce invalid CBOR map with wrong count. Per previous j7lm/48l1. Also update error handling for ENOBUFS case. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Capacity fields added to encode, map_count fixed to 9 base+optionals, cbor_header updated with >255 overflow guard, error paths now use REQUEST_ENTITY_TOO_LARGE for encode-fail (ENOBUFS case). All codereview findings addressed across 3 passes with no new P0-P2 issues after final validation build.
